# this is the build file for project elx
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(elx VERSION 0.1.0 LANGUAGES C)
set(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID ${CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID})

# target
add_executable(elx "")
set_target_properties(elx PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "elx")
set_target_properties(elx PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/linux/x86_64/debug")
target_include_directories(elx SYSTEM PRIVATE
    /usr/include/libmount
    /usr/include/blkid
    /usr/include/glib-2.0
    /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/glib-2.0/include
)
target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wshadow>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wconversion>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wformat=2>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wnull-dereference>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wdouble-promotion>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-Wundef>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-rdynamic>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fsanitize=address>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-g>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-std=c23>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-fno-omit-frame-pointer>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-pthread>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-pthread>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-G>
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -W4)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wall)
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wextra)
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wpedantic)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wall)
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wextra)
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Wpedantic)
endif()
set_target_properties(elx PROPERTIES C_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(elx PRIVATE c_std_23)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Od>)
else()
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -O0)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(elx PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET elx PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(elx PRIVATE
    gio-2.0
    gobject-2.0
    glib-2.0
    gthread-2.0
    gmodule-2.0
    ffi
    z
)
target_link_options(elx PRIVATE
    -m64
    -rdynamic
    -no-pie
    -fsanitize=address
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c.build for target elx
target_sources(elx PRIVATE 
    src/vector.c
    src/logger.c
    src/panic.c
    src/parser.c
    src/strview.c
    src/token_tables.c
    src/lexer.c
    src/xalloc.c
    src/main.c
    src/token_utils.c
    src/parser_utils.c
    src/analyzer.c
    src/token.c
    src/hash.c
    src/str.c
    src/str_utils.c
    src/allocator.c
    src/array.c
    src/hashtable.c
    src/fmt.c
    src/todo.c
    src/token_kind.c
)
